title: Beef Yakitori
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring grilled beef skewers, marinated in a sweet soy sauce mixture. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, mirin, sake, and sugar to make the marinade.
Add the sliced beef to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the beef for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions and a drizzle of sesame oil.
